Viscountess '''Whirry Malreaux''' was the mother of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]] and his [[Whie Malreaux's brother|brother]]. She was one of the last surviving members of the [[House Malreaux]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. Driven insane by the madness that ravaged the dreary [[Planet/Legends|world]], caused by her ancestors' experiments on [[Midi-chlorian/Legends|midi-chlorians]], she came to believe that she could tell the future by looking at the pattern ordinary objects made when they broke. She apparently took to [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholism]], for when she surrendered her son to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], she was said to be drunk. She afterward regretted letting him go.

When the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] leader, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] of [[Serenno/Legends|Serenno]] came to Vjun, he took over Lady Malreaux's [[Château Malreaux|mansion]], Whirry was reduced to a mere house keeper. She anxiously awaited the return of her son while serving Dooku. She secretly consulted with Fidelis to lead Whie home, but when Dooku found out his housekeeper was contacting the party he was trying to trap and destroy, he ordered Whirry to tell Fidelis to lead them into [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]].

When Whirry met her son for the first time in [[Standard year/Legends|years]], all she saw was a stranger. Unable to cope with the "loss" of her baby, she left him to return to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and possibly committed [[Death/Legends|suicide]].

She was often followed by her [[Force familiar|familiar]], the [[Vjun fox]] she had named [[Miss Vix]].
